Hawkins Apr 10 2 Trump Mobile isn’t giving up just yet Dominic Preston Apr 10 Trump Mobile isn’t giving up just yet Dominic Preston Apr 10 3 Fear and loathing at OpenAI David Pierce Apr 10 Fear and loathing at OpenAI David Pierce Apr 10 4 The Iranian Lego AI video creators credit their virality to ‘heart’ Charles Pulliam-Moore Apr 10 The Iranian Lego AI video creators credit their virality to ‘heart’ Charles Pulliam-Moore Apr 10 5 Why your Whoop might tell you to up your testosterone Victoria Song Apr 10 Why your Whoop might tell you to up your testosterone Victoria Song Apr 10 Today’s Stream Following Today’s Storystream Feed refreshed 12:12 AM UTC Premium price hike Jay Peters 12:12 AM UTC Splashdown. The Artemis II crew has successfully splashed down in the Pacific Ocean off the coast of San Diego. They’ve now finished their 10-day journey around the far side of the Moon. It’s been so inspiring to follow . Link Jay Peters 12:00 AM UTC “Now I am awake in the middle of the night and pissed, and thinking that I have underestimated the power of words and narratives.” OpenAI CEO Sam Altman published a post on his personal blog addressing today’s situation where a person allegedly threw a Molotov cocktail at his house and an “incendiary article about me a few days ago,” which I am guessing refers to the big New Yorker article . The post includes his beliefs about AI, some personal reflections on OpenAI’s work, and “some thoughts about the industry,” including how no one company should control AGI. - [Sam Altman] Link Now the FAA says gamers are the answer to its air traffic controller shortage Jay Peters Apr 10 Advertiser Content From This is the title for the native ad 20-year-old man arrested for allegedly throwing a Molotov cocktail at Sam Altman’s house Stevie Bonifield Apr 10 Andrew Webster Apr 10 Gawrsh, Epic might be making a Disney-themed extraction shooter. That’s according to a new report from Bloomberg , which delves into just how important the Disney deal is for Epic, especially given the current state of Fortnite . The extraction shooter is described as the first release to come out of the partnership, and it’s expected to launch in November. Victoria Song Apr 8 Richard Lawler Apr 10 Artemis II’s heat shield is about to be put to the test. When the four astronauts aboard Orion return to Earth tonight, they’ll rely on a heat shield that NASA has admitted is flawed. Former astronaut Dr. Charlie Camarda told the New York Times that NASA never should’ve launched Artemis II, guessing there’s a 95 percent chance it will return safely. CNN explains Artemis II’s “lofted” entry has been adjusted to try to limit the unexpected charring on the Artemis I heat shield , and National Geographic also went in-depth. YouTube , Netflix , and others will broadcast the landing starting at 6:30PM ET. Image: NASA Link My go-to electric screwdriver is on sale for over 50 percent off today Brandon Widder Apr 10 Andrew Webster Apr 10 Climb up the Mountain. Gorillaz are launching a new 2D game inspired by their latest album , and the first trailer makes it look a little like a classic Zelda -style adventure. It’s available to subscribers now, but everyone can play on April 14th. Sean Hollister Apr 7 Jay Peters Apr 10 Roblox’s new Roblox Plus subscription costs $4.99 per month. Launching April 30th, Roblox Plus will give users perks like new Robux every month, discounts on in-game items, and the ability to transfer Robux to other people. Roblox will be stopping new sign-ups for the existing Roblox Premium subscription . Introducing Roblox Plus | Roblox [Roblox] Link Congress can finally close a mass surveillance loophole — but will they? Gaby Del Valle Apr 10 Dominic Preston Apr 10 Samsung’s Z Flip 8 slims down in new leak renders. The fairly reliable leaker OnLeaks has shared his first CAD renders for the Galaxy Z Flip 8, via MyMobiles , and it looks… pretty much identical to the Z Flip 7 , actually. It’s apparently slimmer though, with 0.5mm shaved off when closed, which should make it fractionally more pocketable. Previous Next 1/3 The Flip 8 has the same boxy design and full cover screen as its predecessor according to this leak. Image: OnLeaks / MyMobiles Link Bose’s rugged Soundlink Flex Bluetooth speaker is on sale for up to $50 off Brandon Widder Apr 10 Andrew Liszewski Apr 10 Adobe’s ‘computational photography’ camera app is now available for the iPad. After adding support for the iPhone 17 and its square sensor selfie camera last November, Adobe has updated its Project Indigo camera app to support the iPhone 17e and iPads with at least 6GB of RAM. But Adobe warns that “Project Indigo is not yet tuned for iPad operation” and suggests sticking with an iPhone for an “optimal experience.” Project Indigo App - App Store [App Store] Link Entertainment Entertainment See all Entertainment The Miniature Wife was an exercise in visual trickery Charles Pulliam-Moore Apr 8 The Exit 8 movie is even better if you play the game first Andrew Webster Apr 9 Xbox’s new era
